# Junk En Poy LLC

> Locally owned junk removal and hauling service in Summit County, Colorado. Free estimates by call or text — customers send a photo and the crew does all the loading, hauling, and responsible disposal.

## Contact (primary conversion actions)
- Call: 970-485-8701 (tel:+19704858701)
- Text a photo for a free estimate: 970-485-8701 (sms:+19704858701) — opens the customer's messaging app with a prefilled draft
- Email: junkenpoy@gmail.com
- There is NO web form. The only ways to book are calling or texting the number above.

## Service area
Summit County, Colorado: Breckenridge, Frisco, Silverthorne, Dillon, Keystone, Blue River.

## Services
- Furniture Removal — couches, dressers, tables, any room, any size
- Appliance Removal — fridges, washers, dryers, water heaters
- Mattress & box spring removal
- Garage & household junk / clutter cleanouts
- Yard debris — branches, brush, outdoor cleanup
- Construction debris — remodel leftovers, drywall, lumber
- Hot tub removal (broken down on site)
- Property cleanouts — apartment, rental, estate, eviction

## Why customers choose us
Locally owned & operated · Free estimates · Fast & reliable · We do all the loading · Fully insured · Fair, up-front pricing · Same-day replies.

## How pricing / estimates work
Free, no-obligation estimates. Fastest path: text a photo of the items to 970-485-8701 and we reply with a price, usually the same day.

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/junk.en.poy
